$comment: Extracted from specs/user-post-search/spec.md. Each state names a distinct UI condition reachable on /user; each transition names a user action or system event that moves the UI between states.

states.description: Signed-in user on their own user page. Header shows '내 프로필' + search icon + settings icon. Body shows UserProfile + UserPostsList (infinite scroll).
Signed-in user on another user's page. Header returns null (no search icon, no settings).

Search mode active, trimmed query length < 2. Sticky header with close button + input. Body content depends on the substate: when trimmedQuery.length === 0 the body renders NO content (input placeholder is the only cue); when trimmedQuery.length === 1 the body renders the hint '2글자 이상 입력해주세요.' centered in muted text. No search request fires in either substate.
Search mode active, trimmed query >= 2, request in flight, no prior data in cache for this (userId, query).
Search mode active, results returned with 1..49 posts; PostItem list rendered, no cap notice.
Search mode active, results count == 50; PostItem list rendered + cap notice '최근 50개까지만 표시됩니다…'.
Search mode active, response returned []; empty message rendered.
Search mode active, API errored; '검색 중 문제가 발생했습니다…' rendered; Sentry.captureException invoked.
Navigated away from /user to /board/<bid>/post/<pid> via clicking a result card.

transitions.trigger: click search icon (aria-label='내 글 검색') OR Enter/Space on it
type a >=2 code-unit substring; wait ~300ms debounce
clear input below 2 code units (keepPreviousData regression guard)
click close button (aria-label='검색 닫기'); focus returns to search icon
press Escape while input has focus; focus returns to search icon
